results.title: Trump's Iran peace deal claim completely undone with just 3 words
results.description: The US president claimed negotiations were "proceeding nicely" even as Iran's foreign ministry slammed Monday's strikes as a ceasefire violation.

results.title: 71 Officers from Kenya and 19 Allied Nations Graduate from National Defence College in Multinational Cohort
results.description: NAIROBI, Kenya, May 26-Kenya has reaffirmed its ambition to position itself as a regional hub for strategic military education and security leadership following the graduation of 71 senior officers and civilian officials from the National Defence College (NDC), drawn from Kenya, government agencies, and 19 allied countries. Texas Republican runoff between Cornyn and Paxton
results.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton is in a tense runoff with Incumbent Sen. John Cornyn on Tuesday. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe has more.

results.title: Italy’s top court rules against tourist refused tap water in Dolomites hotel
results.description: A tourist’s simple request for a glass of tap water at a hotel restaurant in the Italian Dolomites has culminated in Italy’s top court ruling that being served water from the tap is not a consumer right, after a lengthy and costly legal saga. The case dates back to 2019 when the woman spent a [...] The post Italy’s top court rules against tourist refused tap water in Dolomites hotel appeared first on NYT News Today .

results.title: Trump Wants Pakistan In Abraham Accords, Islamabad Rejects Israel Normalisation Plan
results.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is attempting to revive and expand the Abraham Accords as part of a broader West Asia strategy, but Pakistan has firmly rejected joining any agreement involving formal ties with Israel. Islamabad reiterated that it cannot recognise Israel until a Palestinian state is established. Trump’s proposal comes amid the ongoing Gaza war, rising tensions with Iran and shifting regional alliances. While countries like the UAE and Bahrain have already deepened ties with Israel under the Abraham Accords, Saudi Arabia has slowed normalisation talks following the Gaza conflict. The latest push highlights growing geopolitical divisions across the Muslim world over Israel and Palestine.

results.title: Federal court blocks Alabama plan for new congressional districts that could help Republicans
results.description: A three-judge panel in the state's long-running redistricting case issued the preliminary injunction that prevents the state, at least for now, from switching maps.

results.title: Exact cause of Windsor Assembly Plant explosion unclear, court hears
results.description: Lead explosive disposal unit officer told court that investigators were unable to determine the exact origin point of the explosion.
